name: method
value: Use this packet for geometry handoff only: nominal prop pitch labels, UIUC station beta/chord, and current RotorSpec pitch/chord proxies. Do not treat label pitch as slip-corrected aerodynamic advance, and keep large-lift prop geometry separate from the 5-inch FPV default P/D = 0.85.
